plugins.name: brand-system
plugins.description: Build a canonical, brand-agnostic, output-agnostic brand source for any brand — a four-layer canon + DTCG/OKLCH token spine — then a real prototype, a /design-sync-ready component library, and a single attachable keystone .md an AI can think, speak, and design as the brand. Analyzes published work by default, or authors from a ratified brief.
